title: Tangy Midnight Rice Krispie Crumble
description: A tangy and fluffy Filipino-inspired dessert featuring rice krispies, crispy fried potatoes (sweet or regular), dairy-free elements for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a decorative touch and added crunch

instructions: Combine the Rice Krispie Treats and soaked cashews in a bowl.
Add the coconut milk or almond milk, vanilla extract, salt, and sesame seeds if using. Mix well until evenly distributed.
Spread the mixture onto a greased baking sheet and press down gently to create an even layer.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving with your choice of toppings such as honey, dark chocolate shavings, or more sesame seeds if desired.
